name: DefaultRenderPackage
summary: Example implementation of IRenderPackage. DefaultRenderPackage can be used as package for your visualization.

methods.name: AddLineStripVertex(double, double, double)
methods.signature: void AddLineStripVertex(double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Add a line vertex to the render package.

methods.name: AddLineStripVertexColor(byte, byte, byte, byte)
methods.signature: void AddLineStripVertexColor(byte red, byte green, byte blue, byte alpha)
methods.summary: Add a line strip vertex color to the render package.

methods.name: AddLineStripVertexCount(int)
methods.signature: void AddLineStripVertexCount(int n)
methods.summary: Add a line strip vertex count to the render package.

methods.name: AddPointVertex(double, double, double)
methods.signature: void AddPointVertex(double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Add a point vertex to the render package.

methods.name: AddPointVertexColor(byte, byte, byte, byte)
methods.signature: void AddPointVertexColor(byte red, byte green, byte blue, byte alpha)
methods.summary: Add a point color to the render package.

methods.name: AddTextureMapForMeshVerticesRange(int, int, byte[], int)
methods.signature: void AddTextureMapForMeshVerticesRange(int startIndex, int endIndex, byte[] textureMap, int stride)
methods.summary: Set a color map for a range of mesh vertices

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index associated with the first vertex in MeshVertices we want to associate with the texture map

params.name: endIndex
params.doc: The index associated with the last vertex in MeshVertices we want to associate with the texture map

params.name: textureMap
params.doc: An array of bytes representing RGBA colors to be used as a color texture map

params.name: stride
params.doc: The size of one dimension of the colors array

methods.name: AddTriangleVertex(double, double, double)
methods.signature: void AddTriangleVertex(double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Add a triangle vertex location to the render package.

methods.name: AddTriangleVertexColor(byte, byte, byte, byte)
methods.signature: void AddTriangleVertexColor(byte red, byte green, byte blue, byte alpha)
methods.summary: Add a triangle vertex color to the render package.

methods.name: AddTriangleVertexNormal(double, double, double)
methods.signature: void AddTriangleVertexNormal(double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Add a triangle vertex normal to the render package.

methods.name: AddTriangleVertexUV(double, double)
methods.signature: void AddTriangleVertexUV(double u, double v)
methods.summary: Add a triangle texture coordinate to the render package.

methods.name: AppendLineVertexColorRange(byte[])
methods.signature: void AppendLineVertexColorRange(byte[] colors)
methods.summary: Append a color range for line vertices.

params.name: colors
params.doc: A buffer of R,G,B,A values corresponding to each vertex.

methods.name: AppendMeshVertexColorRange(byte[])
methods.signature: void AppendMeshVertexColorRange(byte[] colors)
methods.summary: Append a color range for mesh vertex.

params.name: colors
params.doc: A buffer of R,G,B,A values corresponding to each vertex.

methods.name: AppendPointVertexColorRange(byte[])
methods.signature: void AppendPointVertexColorRange(byte[] colors)
methods.summary: Append a color range for point vertices.

params.name: colors
params.doc: A buffer of R,G,B,A values corresponding to each vertex.

methods.name: ApplyLineVertexColors(byte[])
methods.signature: void ApplyLineVertexColors(byte[] colors)
methods.summary: Apply a color to a sequence of line vertices.

methods.name: ApplyMeshVertexColors(byte[])
methods.signature: void ApplyMeshVertexColors(byte[] colors)
methods.summary: Apply a color to each mesh vertex.

params.name: colors
params.doc: A buffer of R,G,B,A values corresponding to each vertex.

methods.name: ApplyPointVertexColors(byte[])
methods.signature: void ApplyPointVertexColors(byte[] colors)
methods.summary: Apply a color to each point vertex.

params.name: colors
params.doc: A buffer of R,G,B,A values corresponding to each vertex.

methods.name: Clear
methods.signature: void Clear()
methods.summary: Clear all render data from the render package.

methods.name: SetColors(byte[])
methods.signature: void SetColors(byte[] colors)
methods.summary: Sets an array of bytes that is used as a color map.

methods.name: UpdateLineVertexColorForRange(int, int, byte, byte, byte, byte)
methods.signature: void UpdateLineVertexColorForRange(int startIndex, int endIndex, byte red, byte green, byte blue, byte alpha)
methods.summary: Update a color to a range of line vertices.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index associated with the first vertex in LineVertices we want to associate with a color

params.name: endIndex
params.doc: The index associated with the last vertex in LineVertices we want to associate with a color

params.name: red
params.doc: byte for the red RGB value

params.name: green
params.doc: byte for the green RGB value

params.name: blue
params.doc: byte for the blue RGB value

params.name: alpha
params.doc: byte for the alpha RGB value

methods.name: UpdateMeshVertexColorForRange(int, int, byte, byte, byte, byte)
methods.signature: void UpdateMeshVertexColorForRange(int startIndex, int endIndex, byte red, byte green, byte blue, byte alpha)
methods.summary: Update a color to a range of of mesh vertices.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index associated with the first vertex in MeshVertices we want to associate with a color

params.name: endIndex
params.doc: The index associated with the last vertex in MeshVertices we want to associate with a color

params.name: red
params.doc: byte for the red RGB value

params.name: green
params.doc: byte for the green RGB value

params.name: blue
params.doc: byte for the blue RGB value

params.name: alpha
params.doc: byte for the alpha RGB value

methods.name: UpdatePointVertexColorForRange(int, int, byte, byte, byte, byte)
methods.signature: void UpdatePointVertexColorForRange(int startIndex, int endIndex, byte red, byte green, byte blue, byte alpha)
methods.summary: Update a color to a range of point vertices.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index associated with the first vertex in PointVertices we want to associate with a color

params.name: endIndex
params.doc: The index associated with the last vertex in PointVertices we want to associate with a color

params.name: red
params.doc: byte for the red RGB value

params.name: green
params.doc: byte for the green RGB value

params.name: blue
params.doc: byte for the blue RGB value

params.name: alpha
params.doc: byte for the alpha RGB value

properties.name: AllowLegacyColorOperations
properties.summary: Allow legacy usage of the color methods in IRenderPackage This flag is used by the UpdateRenderPackageAsyncTask implementation to flag any third party usage of deprecated color methods in IRenderPackage API

properties.name: Colors
properties.summary: Returns the collection of bytes representing RGBA colors. This field can be used to populate textures for mapping onto surfaces. Use the ColorsStride property to define the size of one dimension of the collection.

properties.name: ColorsStride
properties.summary: The size of one dimension of the Colors collection.

properties.name: Description
properties.summary: A tag used to store information about the render package.

properties.name: DisplayLabels
properties.summary: Returns true if the render package is displaying labels.

properties.name: HasRenderingData
properties.summary: Returns true if the render package has data.

properties.name: IsSelected
properties.summary: Returns true if the render package is selected.

properties.name: LineStripIndices
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all line strip indices.

properties.name: LineStripVertexColors
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all line strip colors as r1,g1,b1,a1,r2,g2,b2,a2...

properties.name: LineStripVertexCounts
properties.summary: Returns the collection of int values representing how many vertices comprise each line segment in the package.

properties.name: LineStripVertices
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all line strip vertices as x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2...

properties.name: LineVertexColorCount
properties.summary: The number of line vertices colors in the package (Optimized for speed).

properties.name: LineVertexCount
properties.summary: Returns the number of line vertices in the package divided by 3.

properties.name: MeshIndices
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all mesh vertex indices.

properties.name: MeshNormals
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all mesh normals as x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2...

properties.name: MeshTextureCoordinates
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all mesh texture coordinates as u1,v1,u2,v2...

properties.name: MeshVertexColorCount
properties.summary: The number of mesh vertices colors in the package (Optimized for speed).

properties.name: MeshVertexColors
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all mesh vertex colors as r1,g1,b1,a1,r2,g2,b2,a2...

properties.name: MeshVertexCount
properties.summary: Returns the number of mesh vertices in the package divided by 3.

properties.name: MeshVertices
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all mesh vertices as x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2...

properties.name: MeshVerticesRangesAssociatedWithTextureMaps
properties.summary: A list of mesh vertices ranges that have associated texture maps

properties.name: PointIndices
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all mesh vertex indices.

properties.name: PointVertexColorCount
properties.summary: The number of point vertices colors in the package (Optimized for speed).

properties.name: PointVertexColors
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all mesh vertex colors as r1,g1,b1,a1,r2,g2,b2,a2...

properties.name: PointVertexCount
properties.summary: Returns the number of point vertices in the package divided by 3.

properties.name: PointVertices
properties.summary: Returns the collection containing all point vertices as x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2...

properties.name: RequiresPerVertexColoration
properties.summary: Returns true if the render package requires per vertex coloration

properties.name: TextureMapsList
properties.summary: A List containing arrays of bytes representing RGBA colors. These arrays can be used to populate textures for mapping onto specific meshes

properties.name: TextureMapsStrideList
properties.summary: A list containing the size of one dimension of the associated texture map array in TextureMapsList.
